summary: Excellent front‑of‑house matrix recording with crystal‑clear sound and superb playing.
review: Both reviewers rave about the audio, calling it “great” and “sweet,” and they specifically praise the Brotman/Schoeps source and BK4011 pull. The performance is described as “awesome playing,” indicating a strong musical showing despite no specific song mentions. Overall the tape delivers an outstanding listening experience.

ai_rating.rationale: Two consistent 5‑star reviews highlight exceptional sound quality and great performance, leading to a high rating despite the limited number of reviews.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers note crisp, sweet tone from the Brotman/Schoeps front‑of‑house mix and praise the BK4011 pull; no issues reported.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure; reviewers only mention overall awesome playing.
